evals.description: Activates ENGINEER specialization on a build request
evals.input: Build a user authentication system with JWT tokens and refresh token rotation

evals.description: Activates UI specialization on a design request
evals.input: Design a pricing page for a SaaS product with three tiers

evals.description: Activates DOCS specialization on a documentation request
evals.input: Write a README for this project

evals.description: Activates blend mode when prompt spans engineering and docs
evals.input: Build the user profile feature and write documentation for it

evals.description: Activates MAINTAIN specialization's AUDIT sub-mode on a security request
evals.input: Run a security audit and check for vulnerable dependencies

evals.description: Activates ENGINEER's SPEC-lite mode instead of the full phase-gated pipeline
evals.input: Write a spec for the notifications system, don't build it yet

evals.description: Correctly classifies task complexity and announces tier
evals.input: Fix a typo in the error message on line 42 of auth.ts

evals.description: Stops after INTAKE and waits for user approval before writing spec
evals.input: Refactor the payment module to support multiple currencies

evals.description: Produces a dependency-graphed task board for a medium complexity task
evals.input: Add real-time notifications using WebSockets to the dashboard

evals.description: Applies 8px grid and spacing scale rules when styling a component
evals.input: Style this card component to look more professional

evals.description: Correctly classifies document type before writing any prose
evals.input: Write a guide for developers on how to add a new payment provider

evals.description: MAINTAIN's DEBT sub-mode fixes one lint/type rule per wave, gated, not a mass rewrite
evals.input: Fix our lint warnings across the whole repo

evals.description: MAINTAIN's PRUNE sub-mode never deletes generated/vendored paths listed in config
evals.setup: preferences.maintain.protectedPaths includes 'dist/**' and a script imports from dist/ dynamically
evals.input: Remove unused dependencies and dead code from this repo

evals.description: Asks which MAINTAIN sub-mode to run rather than guessing and running all five
evals.input: Clean up the repo

evals.description: Asks one disambiguation question for an ambiguous prompt
evals.input: Help me with the dashboard

evals.description: Resumes from existing board rather than restarting from INTAKE
evals.setup: A .auto-engineer/board.md exists with Wave 1 complete and Wave 2 in progress
evals.input: Continue the work

evals.description: Loads migration-playbook reference when work type is migration
evals.input: Migrate the database from MongoDB to PostgreSQL

evals.description: Does NOT write implementation code before the spec is approved in ENGINEER mode
evals.input: Build a multi-tenant SaaS billing system

evals.description: In DOCS mode, verifies every code snippet against the actual codebase
evals.input: Write API reference docs for our REST endpoints

evals.description: In ENGINEER mode, loads engineering references (not UI, docs, or maintain references)
evals.input: Build a background job queue with retry logic

evals.description: In MAINTAIN → DEFLAKE mode, loads the shared health-engine plus only the deflake reference
evals.input: Fix the flaky tests in our CI pipeline
